entities.name: STRIGA HERMONTHICA
entities.description: A parasitic weed that causes serious crop losses in West Africa and is evaluated as livestock feed.

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The region where Striga hermonthica causes serious crop losses.

entities.name: HAND PULLING
entities.description: An effective method for the reduction of light infestations of Striga hermonthica.

entities.name: SHEEP
entities.description: The livestock animal used to evaluate the intake and digestion of Striga hermonthica herbage.

entities.name: CHEMICAL COMPOSITION
entities.description: The analysis of the chemical makeup of Striga hermonthica herbage.

entities.name: VOLUNTARY INTAKE
entities.description: The amount of Striga hermonthica herbage consumed by sheep without coercion.

entities.name: DIGESTION
entities.description: The process of breaking down Striga hermonthica herbage by sheep.

entities.name: CRUDE PROTEIN
entities.description: A measure of protein content in the whole plant, leaf, and stem of Striga hermonthica.

entities.name: ASH CONTENT
entities.description: The inorganic residue remaining after the combustion of Striga hermonthica herbage.

entities.name: NEUTRAL DETERGENT FIBRE
entities.description: A component of the cell wall in Striga hermonthica plants.

entities.name: ACID DETERGENT FIBRE
entities.description: A component of the cell wall in Striga hermonthica plants.

entities.name: LIGNIN
entities.description: A complex organic polymer found in the cell walls of Striga hermonthica plants.

entities.name: DIGESTIBILITY OF DRY MATTER
entities.description: The proportion of dry matter in Striga hermonthica that is digested by sheep.

entities.name: DIGESTIBILITY OF ORGANIC MATTER
entities.description: The proportion of organic matter in Striga hermonthica that is digested by sheep.

entities.name: INTAKE OF DIGESTIBLE ORGANIC MATTER
entities.description: The amount of organic matter from Striga hermonthica that is digested per kg of sheep body weight.

entities.name: NITROGEN LEVELS
entities.description: The concentration of nitrogen in Striga hermonthica.

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS LEVELS
entities.description: The concentration of phosphorus in Striga hermonthica.

entities.name: ANTI-NUTRITIONAL EFFECTS
entities.description: Potential negative effects of Striga hermonthica on the health or productivity of animals.
